# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of what this PR adds or fixes.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:
- [ ] Tested on Chrome
- [ ] Tested on Firefox
- [ ] Tested on Safari
- [ ] Tested on mobile device

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new console warnings
- [ ] I have tested with various bookmark file sizes
- [ ] Privacy features are preserved (no data leaks)

## Additional Notes

Any additional information for reviewers.

## Privacy Check (for AI features)

If your PR involves AI features:
- [ ] No API keys are hardcoded
- [ ] User data is not sent to unauthorized servers
- [ ] Local-first principle is maintained
